content:
My name is Katharine (Rin) Tena, and I am an aspiring game designer currently studying at the University of Pittsburgh. I am passionate about making games that provide a unique and compelling experience to its users! Aside from my professional development, my interests include traditional Filipino dancing (Tinikling), rock climbing, and painting! hello
View ResumeView Portfolio

Created this game in Unity about a crow collecting treasures with a group of four others. Worked as a team to design and organize this project within a week. Collaborated in designing and programming.#Play
title: Crow Game

content: Explored combining a 3D environment with 2D assets on Unity. Presented the design document, then made the game within the week of the session. Responsible for the art as well as assisting in the design of the game.#Play
title: Evan's Home

content: The theme of this Game Jam was “public” with a two day time limit. Made a “public garden” farming game in Unity that showcased plants and elements from different cultures. Ranked 4th in Jammer’s Choice. Responsible for the game design and art.#Play
title: Garden of Unity

content: Submission for SheInnovates Hackathon 2026. Executed menu screen, level selection, and writing. Group worked in Godot, a new platform for every group member. The game is a top down shooter with the goal of teaching college students how to manage their debts.#Play
title: Red Debt Redemption

content: Created a game inspired by a children’s book. Selected We Are in a Book! by Mo Willams to create a classic platformer in Unity with two player characters, Elephant and Piggy. Contributed to level design, art, and part of the programming for this group project.#Watch PlaythroughView Github
title: We Are In A Game
